Knowledge Base
Sources
Total Chunks0

QABuddy.AI

Hybrid RAG for QA

understandretrievererankanswer with sources
Architecture
Online

How the Answer is Fetched

1Understand

Rewrite & expand the question into search variants

2Search

Parallel dense + BM25 retrieval across all sources

3Rank

Cross-encoder reranker picks the best 6 chunks

4Answer

LLM generates cited response from grounded context

llm openai/gpt-oss-120b|embed BAAI/bge-m3

Press Enter to send. Shift+Enter for new line.
